0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ingel81/ioBroker.unraid/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/ingel81/ioBroker.unraid/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.

0069.issue: [W0069] The following dependencies require a node.js version incompatible with the adapter's minimum (node 22.0.0): undici (requires node: ">=22.19.0"). Please increase the engines.node requirement at [package.json](https://github.com/ingel81/ioBroker.unraid/blob/master/package.json) or update/replace the incompatible dependencies.
